name: Treegrid File Explorer
summary: The runnable home for the treegrid hierarchy projection on the Data Grid (#1461, ratified #1411) — treegrid is a projection on the grid, not a new block. A file-explorer role=treegrid: rows carry aria-level + aria-expanded, and the Right/Left arbitration rule (Right expands a collapsed folder / else moves a cell; Left collapses an expanded folder / else moves a cell) layers over the unchanged grid cell-navigation. Rows are the Hierarchy intent's flatten-to-visible projection. Backlog #1461.
description:
Concept

A live role="treegrid" over the Data Grid block: per the #1411 ruling, treegrid is a hierarchy projection on the grid — same role=row/gridcell, same roving cell navigation — with the single net-new Right/Left arbitration rule. The rows are the Hierarchy intent's flatten-to-visible projection, each carrying aria-level + aria-expanded.

Arbitration

On a collapsed folder's first cell, Right expands it; on an expanded folder, Left collapses it; otherwise Right/Left fall back to cell-movement. Up/Down move between visible rows. Conformance vector: treegrid-arbitration.
